query: SELECT DISTINCT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Boonphone' GROUP BY remark ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 30
